title: Parkour - Course Builder
description: Let players build and share their own parkour courses. Leaderboards, checkpoints, and unlimited creativity.
body:
# 🏃 Parkour — Build, Run, Compete

Give your players the tools to build their own parkour courses, then race through each other's creations.

The BentoBox Parkour addon turns every player's island into a potential parkour course. Players design courses on their island, set start and end points, and other players can warp in to attempt them. Timed runs and leaderboards create natural competition.

## 🎮 How It Works

- 🏗️ **Build courses** — design parkour on your island using any blocks
- 🏁 **Set waypoints** — mark start, checkpoints, and end points
- ⏱️ **Timed runs** — automatic timing from start to finish
- 🏆 **Leaderboards** — compete for the fastest time on each course
- 🔗 **Warps** — players can warp to any course and attempt it

## ⚙️ Features

- **Player-generated content** — unlimited courses designed by your community
- **Automatic timing** — precise run timing with personal bests
- **Checkpoint system** — respawn at the last checkpoint on failure
- **Works with Warps addon** — easy course discovery
- **Free and open source**

## 📦 Installation

Requires **BentoBox** on a **Paper** server.

1. Install [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox)
2. Place `Parkour.jar` into `plugins/BentoBox/addons/`
3. Restart
4. `/pk` to start playing

📖 Docs: [docs.bentobox.world](https://docs.bentobox.world) | 💬 Discord: [discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld](https://discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld) | 🐛 Issues: [GitHub](https://github.com/BentoBoxWorld/Parkour/issues)
